feature: Fix dark mode in meal-plan-config.tsx — additive dark: variant pass

prompts.description: Add dark: variants to the 5 hardcoded light-mode color classes in meal-plan-config.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/meal-plan-config.tsx, make exactly these changes and nothing else. Do NOT alter any light-mode classes, spacing, shadows, or layout.

1. Hero badge (line ~95):
   Change: `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] dark:bg-secondary text-[#7a5b41] dark:text-muted-foreground`

2. Daily Target card container (line ~106) — the div wrapping the calorie number and macro tiles:
   Change: `rounded-[22px] border border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] p-4`
   To:     `rounded-[22px] border border-[#e5d7c7] dark:border-border bg-[#f8f2ea] dark:bg-card p-4`

3. "Daily target" label text (line ~109):
   Change: `text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#7a5b41] dark:text-muted-foreground`

4. Accent dot span (line ~152):
   Change: `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749] dark:bg-muted-foreground`

5. Meal rhythm card ternary (lines ~173-174) — the cn() call inside the button className:
   Change:
     `mealsPerDay === count`
     `  ? "border-primary bg-[#edf4ec] shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]"`
     `  : "border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]"`
   To:
     `mealsPerDay === count`
     `  ? "border-primary bg-[#edf4ec] dark:bg-primary/20 shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]"`
     `  : "border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] dark:hover:bg-secondary"`

Leave everything else unchanged — the calorie number (already text-foreground), the meal count number (already text-foreground), the description text (already text-muted-foreground), the macro tiles (already use bridge-stat-tile with semantic bg), and the "Based on your profile" badge (already uses border-border bg-card/70 text-muted-foreground).

Do not touch any other files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
